posts.raw_content:
Is there a driving school in Manassas with white instructors?

Thought for 20s

Yes, there are several driving schools in Manassas, VA (and nearby areas like Manassas Park). However, schools generally don't advertise instructors by race/ethnicity, as that's not a standard practice and could raise legal/ethical issues around discrimination. Instructor rosters can change, and most schools in diverse areas like Northern Virginia have mixed staff.

chamberofcommerce.com

Recommended Schools in/near ManassasHere are some well-reviewed options based on availability, ratings, and mentions of instructors:Signal Hill Manassas Driving School (Manassas/Bristow area) — Strong reviews for behind-the-wheel lessons for teens and adults. One instructor named Chaz (likely Charles) is frequently praised for responsiveness and teaching. DMV-certified, one-on-one lessons.

signalhilldrivingschool.com

Defensive Driving Academy (8811 Sudley Rd, Manassas) — Positive feedback on instructors (e.g., Uma mentioned positively). Offers classes and behind-the-wheel training.

yelp.com

TALA / VA Driving Schools (8737 Plantation Ln, Manassas) — Long-established, multiple instructors, high volume of reviews. Some mention patient instructors like Mr. Aysar (reviews focus on professionalism rather than demographics).

mapquest.com

Safe Driving LLC — Mentions instructor Tania in reviews. Others: Access Driving Academy (nearby Gainesville), Time To Drive, A 2 Z Driving Academy, etc.

Many schools (e.g., Latinos Driving School) cater to specific communities but serve everyone.

latinosdrivingschool.com

*****

is there a driving school in manassas with pakistani instructors?

Thought for 3s

Yes, several driving schools in/near Manassas, VA have instructors of Pakistani origin (or South Asian background with names common in Pakistan, such as Muhammad, Gul, Khan, etc.). Northern Virginia has a sizable South Asian community, so this is fairly common.

apkadrivingschool.com

Notable Options:Apka Driving School (serves Manassas + Fairfax area, location in Manassas Park) — Reviews frequently mention instructors like Muhammad Waqos or similar. Affordable behind-the-wheel for teens/adults, home pickup, DMV-approved. Strong local presence.

apkadrivingschool.com

All in One Driving School (Woodbridge, serves Manassas area) — Instructor Mr. Gul is highly praised in reviews for being patient and responsive.

drivinglessonsschool.com

Anees Driving School (Manassas Park) — Name and descriptions suggest Pakistani-origin ownership/instructors. Offers behind-the-wheel, free pickup/drop-off, high success rate claims.

aneesdrivingschool.com

Go Behind The Wheel (serves Manassas) — Instructor Munawar Khan (explicitly listed as founder/instructor with 15+ years experience).

gobehindthewheel.com

posts.title: Appeals Court Affirms 5-Year Prison Term for Source who Leaked Trump Tax Returns to NY Times. He also leaked tax information about thousands of the richest Americans including Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Warren Buffett to ProPublica.

link_metadata.description: A federal appeals court is affirming a five-year prison sentence for Charles Littlejohn, a consultant to the IRS who leaked President Trump’s tax return information to the New York Times and tax information about thousands of the richest Americans including Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, and Warren Buffett to ProPublica.
link_metadata.title: Appeals Court Affirms 5-Year Prison Term for Source who Leaked Tax Info to NY Times and ProPublica
